name: Elemental HERO Draconic Neos
desc:
1 Level 6 or higher "HERO" monster + 1 Level 6 or higher Dragon monster
This card is also treated as a "Blue-Eyes" monster while face-up on the field.
This card gains 500 ATK for each "HERO" monster and "Blue-Eyes" monster in your GY.
Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can shuffle 1 "HERO" monster or 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your GY into the Deck; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
If this card is sent to the GY, you can Special Summon 1 "HERO" monster or 1 "Blue-Eyes" monster from your Extra Deck ignoring its Summon Condition.
